top_signals.title: Chip Giant CXMT Seeks $9.8 Billion in Shanghai IPO
top_signals.summary: Chinese memory giant CXMT Corp. unveiled the terms of its initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘We Faltered’: IBM Falls Most Since At Least 1968 on Sales Miss
top_signals.summary: International Business Machines Corp. shares slid by the most in at least 58 years after the company reported preliminary second-quarter sales that fell short of expectations, attributing the miss to customers shifting their spending to chips and servers amid AI-fueled shortages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: PAE Maritime Awards VCM Contract to TOTE Services
top_signals.summary: TOTE Services, LLC, has been awarded a contract by the Portfolio Acquisition Executive for Maritime (PAE Maritime) to serve as Vessel Construction Manager (VCM) for the Medium Landing Ship (LSM) program.The LSM program is a multi-ship effort requiring coordination across U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
